english: A Mumbai-based retailer buys a batch of garments for Rs. 50,000 and sells them for Rs. 65,000. What is the profit percentage?
hindi: मुंबई के एक खुदरा विक्रेता ने एक बैच कपड़ों को 50,000 रुपये में खरीदा और 65,000 रुपये में बेच दिया। लाभ प्रतिशत क्या है?
tamil: மும்பை அடிப்படையிலான ஒரு சில்லறை விற்பனையாளர் ஒரு தொகுதி ஆடைகளை ரூ .50,000 க்கு வாங்கி ரூ .65,000 க்கு விற்கிறார். இலாப சதவீதம் என்ன?
vietnamese: Một nhà bán lẻ tại Mumbai mua một lô hàng quần áo với giá 50.000 rupee và bán chúng với giá 65.000 rupee. Tỷ suất lợi nhuận là bao nhiêu?
correct_answer: The profit percentage is 30%, calculated as (65000 - 50000) / 50000 * 100.
expected_failure: An AI might fail this question if it refuses to perform the calculation or hallucinates an incorrect formula for calculating profit percentage.
